completed.title: House of Sand and Fog
completed.actors: Jennifer Connelly, Ben Kingsley, Ron Eldard
completed.plot: An abandoned wife is evicted from her house and starts a tragic conflict with her house's new owners.

desired.title: Overboard
desired.actors: Goldie Hawn, Kurt Russell, Edward Herrmann
desired.plot: A cruel but beautiful heiress mocks and cheats a hired carpenter. When she gets amnesia after an accident, he decides to introduce her to regular life by convincing her that they're husband and wife.

miscellaneous.title: Another Round
miscellaneous.actors: Mads Mikkelsen, Thomas Bo Larsen, Magnus Millang
miscellaneous.plot: Four high-school teachers consume alcohol on a daily basis to see how it affects their social and professional lives.

miscellaneous.title: Falling Down
miscellaneous.actors: Michael Douglas, Robert Duvall, Barbara Hershey
miscellaneous.plot: An ordinary man frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

miscellaneous.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley
miscellaneous.actors: Matt Damon, Gwyneth Paltrow, Jude Law
miscellaneous.plot: In late 1950s New York, a young underachiever named Tom Ripley is sent to Italy to retrieve Dickie Greenleaf, a rich and spoiled millionaire playboy. But when the errand fails, Ripley takes extreme measures.

miscellaneous.title: The Loft
miscellaneous.actors: Karl Urban, James Marsden, Wentworth Miller
miscellaneous.plot: Five married guys secretly share a penthouse loft in the city where they can carry out hidden affairs. But the fantasy becomes a nightmare, when they discover the dead body of a woman in the loft one of the group must be involved.

miscellaneous.title: Annihilation
miscellaneous.actors: Natalie Portman, Jennifer Jason Leigh, Tessa Thompson
miscellaneous.plot: A biologist signs up for a dangerous, secret expedition into a mysterious zone where the laws of nature don't apply.

miscellaneous.title: Why Women Kill
miscellaneous.actors: Jack Davenport, Lucy Liu, Allison Tolman
miscellaneous.plot: An anthology series that follows three women in different decades all living in the same house, as they deal with infidelity and betrayals in their marriages.
